summary: TWO_COLUMN: histogram of angles between 80-choose-2 pairs from 200 random unit vectors in dimension d. ValueTracker d_tr steps d = 2, 3, 5, 10, 50, 200; always_redraw smooth curve sharpens around 90° as d grows. YELLOW vertical at 90°; live mean angle, σ, and √(1/d)·180/π prediction on the RIGHT.
